prs.title: Add interactive mode for phx.new
Fix: JS socket wrongly calls logger
Fix phx.new crash when parent directory contains a colon
Fix outdated flash component example in docs
Raise on list value in query string parameter encoding
add eex suffix for generator files
add npm trusted publishing
Add Elixir 1.19 to CI matrix
ensure visibilitychange does not connect if never connected
Address warnings from Elixir 1.20
update eslint
Use custom migration module for auth migration.
Minor Spelling fix in readme
fix: config/prod.exs templates
Add documentation to exclude paths
Include cookie options when deleting remember me cookie
Adds guards support in assert_push, assert_broadcast and assert_reply
Fix concurrent socket teardown
Fix @stream typo in usage-rules liveview streams example
Fix bad link
Add documentation on how to read request data
Revert "fix: autocomplete with email instead of username in email fields"
Stop reconnecting when close was clean
Secure phx.gen.auth forms against PII leakage
Fix LongPoll transport name in sessionStorage and logs
Fix typos in documentation and unit test
Update CoreComponents, add explicit label association
Update installer README, fix deprecated snippet
Remove duplicate word "for" in usage rules for phoenix
Remove autocomplete attribute from hidden field
Starting guides fixes
Small improvements to a couple of pages of the starting guides
phx.gen.auth/schema_token.ex: Improve documentation wording
treat 410 as error if we already have a token
Fix unicode character validation in verified routes
Update data modeling guide (no Ecto.Multi)
Fix missing closing bold tag in html.md
Fix endpoint port config in an umbrella application.
Fix URL pointing to Phoenix.Component
Enable `:force_ssl` in `:prod` environment by default
sort query params in verified routes during tests
Update Dockerfile steps in Releases doc
Fix file path in controllers documentation
use E modifier in config regexes on Elixir 1.19.3+
followup for #6530
Stop reconnecting when page is hidden
mock unreliable docker hub API for tests
Improve asset management documentation
feat: custom dispatcher for Presence handle_diff broadcast
Fixup #6442.
Accept function in `Phoenix.Socket.assign/2`
Generate passing live tests when schema and table names are equal
Update docker template to debian trixie (stable)
Update debian/erlang/elixir versions
Update doc in controller.ex
Add `Phoenix.Controller.assign/2` to match LiveView API
guide: suggestion for awkward sentence
Update CoreComponents template documentation for hidden input support
Fix typo in phx.gen.auth test_cases.exs
[phx gen.auth] test on page content not page nav content
fix: autocomplete with email instead of username in email fields
Fix precommit task to use correct --warnings-as-errors flag
Fix documentation typo in phx.gen.auth token template
Update checkbox input
Enable raise_on_missing_only in development
Fix indentation to mix phx.gen.html doc
Re-add support for hidden inputs
Fix examples for route_prefix/2
Raise when a reference conflicts with the scope on schema generation
PR: Fix typo (word dupe) "will will" -> "will"
Context Guides: Fix and Enhance Code Snippets
Change the socket default for longpoll back to false
Support PORT env var using `runtime.exs`
Update data modelling guide and ecto guide
Fix missing () in error message's suggestion
update scope documentation and config examples
Class attribute type
Update live reload patterns
Remove unused AGENTS.md template and move updates to liveview.md
align phx.gen.auth umbrella error message with other generators
Fix comments in installer config
Prefix unused variable with underscore to silence JS/TS LSP warnings
Update cross_context_boundaries.md
Remove reference to `{:system, env_var}` from docs
Add usage rules entry about migration files
Update Tailwind to version 4.1.12 to prevent some unpredictable behaviors in utility classes.
Fix missing examples
Update contrib guide on how to generate docs
Run mix compile before assets.build in generated aliases
Update controllers documentation
Fix typos
Fix controller.ex documentation typo
Update Agents.md documentation to match current method
Fix typo in contexts.md: correct "realted" to "related"
Remove reference to OTP version affected by CVE-2025-32433
Use separate broadcast functions in phx.gen.context
Move resource listing to private function for consistent LiveView Index updates
Add note on compile time config changes
Fix route.ex typo in scopes.md
final changes for LiveView 1.1
Do not rely on Phoenix.LiveView.JS when using --no-live
don't include node_modules in tsconfig path mapping
registration_live Optimization
add refute_patched to locals_without_parens
split AGENTS.md into small parts
Add guide for live_view generator customization
Update dockerignore.eex
add precommit alias
Optional context argument in generators
Fix code example in guide components.md
Use relative path for JS doc link
Fix minor typos in guide request_lifecycle
Guides: Removes default arg for context create functions
Fixes to Cross-context Boundaries guide
Add @impl true to `phx.gen.auth` LV templates
Add Changelog link to Hex package metadata
Fix phx.gen.context generated docs missing scope
Fix security docs text rendering
initialize empty git repo on phx.new
Clarify Swoosh mailer config instructions in templates
Remove sigil_S from docstrings in templates
Enable Tailwind `dark:` with data-theme attribute
Update Routing Cheatsheet/Guide focused on Verified Routes
Fix missing verified route ~p sigil in generated test
Remove deprecated route names from phx.gen.* templates
Fix missing newline in phx.gen.auth template
run `mix compile` before `mix assets.deploy`
fix phx.gen.cert on OTP 28
Provide better name for validate_email option
`<.button>` component should allow `disabled` property
Remove outdated note about user authentication setup in contexts guide
Simplify token functions for phx.gen.auth
use new Ecto 3.13 features
changes for LiveView 1.1
Add Railway deployment reference links
Security docs
no need for global jsdom
Update channels.md to include correct way to update the channel params for reconnections
Fix phx.gen.presence PubSub server name for umbrella apps
Fix typo in Components guide
Migrate from fieldset to div, closes #6204
Classes should always override
warn when using phx.gen.auth without esbuild
Use separate buttons for remember me
Update Node Deps
Harden CI
Use `bash` for syntax highlighting of windows commands
Include maps in the verified routes section of the routing guide
Grow first column for list
fix typo in Layouts closing tag
Scrub `payload["value"]` for LiveView form submit events
Guides fixes
rename scope helper to test_setup_helper
Update `phx.gen.auth` template for `auth.ex` (fixes typo code comment)
mention js docs in sidebar
Run after compiler callbacks in Phoenix (#6265)
Add debug tags location
Run after compiler callbacks in Phoenix
Update guide file: mix_phx_gen_auth.md (`login` vs `log in` change)
Update various web dependencies
Add more info how to manager 3rd party assets
Update api_authentication.md
Update cross_context_boundaries.md
Clarification of scope configuration
Minor grammar/typo fixes in request_lifecycle.md
use single source of truth for socket token authn docs
Phoenix.Debug
add `:log` to `common_config`
Add fetch() support to LongPoll when XMLHTTPRequest is not available
Allow download attr on `<.button>`
discard price user input in cross-context boundaries guide
allow configuring the scope's assign key in phx.gen.auth
allow overriding auto-detected OTP and Elixir versions
Fix text of context guide
use label instead of fieldset-label
Update scopes guide
Clarify documentation of Channel
Fix a few typos in the guides
remove unused current_password field
use context_app for scopes
only subscribe if connected
Add w-fit to logo to limit is clickable area
Document <Layouts.app>
Apply icons and sizes more consistently.
Load SSL before migration
Fix server-error css selector
Fix typo
Use better styling for errors on light theme
remove unused default argument in generated contexts
phx.gen.auth: Replace `utc_now/0 + truncate/1` with `utc_now/1`
Fix crash when an open :show page gets a PubSub broadcast for other items
use data-phx-session as selector for LV containers
fix: Fix Tailwind custom variants for loading classes
create index for scoped resources
Do not show ANSI escape codes on exception pages
don't rely on floki specific selectors
Remove range from .input
small adjustments for theme switcher
share log in code for token reissueing
Reissue new tokens periodically in phx.gen.auth code.
Do not specify layout: false in PageController examples
Add method to global attributes for generated button core component
do not create a new session on sudo mode re-auth
Adjust the User table name to be plural in Cross Context Boundaries
Fix wrong module name in Scope moduledoc
Improve scopes documentation for on_mount hooks
Move regexes out of module attributes to fix compatibility with OTP 28
Remove no-op lines from recreate_default_css script
invert copy_core_component
Update faq.md: Word missing
update the `hello-from-phoenix.png`
introduction to live view
put_flash/3: document flash key values + generator's defaults
